features.description: Restore command rejects --schema and --data-only used together

layers.name: structural
layers.fail_message: conflicts_with attribute not found on schema field in cli.rs

layers.name: behavioral
layers.fail_message: Conflict test failed or not found

layers.name: runtime
layers.justification: CLI argument validation -- clap rejects at parse time before any runtime execution

alternative_verification.command: cargo run -- restore --schema --data-only test-backup 2>&1 | grep -ci 'cannot be used with'

features.description: resolve_backup_shortcut sorts by timestamp instead of name

layers.name: structural
layers.fail_message: timestamp sort not found in resolve_backup_shortcut

layers.name: compilation
layers.fail_message: Compilation failed after changing sort in resolve_backup_shortcut

layers.name: behavioral
layers.command: cargo test test_resolve_backup_shortcut -- 2>&1 | grep -c 'test result: ok'

layers.name: runtime
layers.justification: Pure function with no I/O -- behavior fully covered by unit tests

features.description: Lock acquired on resolved backup name, not raw CLI shortcut

layers.name: structural
layers.command: grep -n 'fn acquire_backup_lock\|fn acquire_global_lock' src/main.rs | wc -l | tr -d ' '
layers.fail_message: Lock helper functions not found in main.rs

layers.name: compilation
layers.fail_message: Compilation failed after restructuring lock acquisition

layers.name: runtime
layers.justification: Lock ordering is a structural correctness fix -- verified by code inspection that lock_for_command is called after shortcut resolution in every command branch. Integration test would require concurrent process execution.

features.description: backup::create rejects existing backup directory instead of silently overwriting

layers.name: structural
layers.fail_message: Backup existence check not found in backup/mod.rs

layers.name: compilation
layers.fail_message: Compilation failed after adding existence check

layers.name: behavioral
layers.command: cargo test test_create_backup_dir_rejects_existing -- --exact 2>&1 | grep -c 'test result: ok'

layers.name: runtime
layers.justification: Filesystem operation that is fully testable in unit tests with tempdir. Runtime test would require real ClickHouse to reach the directory creation step.

features.description: Design doc updated to note create --resume is deferred

layers.name: structural
layers.fail_message: Design doc not updated for --resume deferred note

layers.name: behavioral
layers.fail_message: Design doc still lists create alongside upload/download/restore for --resume without deferred note

layers.name: structural
layers.fail_message: path_encoding module not publicly exported in lib.rs

layers.name: compilation
layers.fail_message: Doctests for path_encoding failed to compile

layers.name: behavioral
layers.command: cargo test --doc path_encoding 2>&1 | grep -c 'test result: ok'

layers.name: runtime
layers.justification: Doctests are compile-time + test-time verification. No runtime binary involved.
